verdict_reasoning: B4GALT1 is a type II TM glycosyltransferase canonically resident in the trans-Golgi and cis-Golgi. However, it exhibits documented dual localization with a minority pool cycling to the PM and recycling endosomes during active secretory flux and in specialized cell types. The protein has its own TM anchor and participates in constitutive vesicular cycling; the surface pool is non-equilibrium and wash-resistant via active trafficking pathways.
